explanationZhTw: `wake up` 是常見片語動詞，意思是「醒來」。這裡是過去完成式 `had woken up`，表示在某個過去時間點之前已經醒來。
generatedExample: I woke up early because of the noise outside.

explanationZhTw: 這裡不是字面上的「眼睛裡裝滿眼淚」，而是表示他剛醒來時正在哭、眼中含淚，屬於依上下文理解的表達。
generatedExample: After the movie, she was full of tears.

explanationZhTw: `murmur` 表示低聲喃喃說話、含糊地說。這裡描述她半睡半醒地小聲說了什麼。
generatedExample: He was murmuring to himself as he read the note.

explanationZhTw: 這是常用口語，意思是「怎麼了？」或「發生什麼事了？」通常用來詢問對方是否不舒服或有問題。
generatedExample: You look worried. What's the matter?

explanationZhTw: 「stopped short」表示話說到一半突然停住，因為驚訝、猶豫或一時想不起來。
generatedExample: She stopped short when she saw the broken window.

explanationZhTw: 「put into words」是慣用說法，意思是把想法、感受或經驗清楚說出來；這裡指事情太複雜，難以用語言表達。
generatedExample: He tried to put his feelings into words, but it was difficult.

explanationZhTw: 這裡的「swum into his mind」是比喻性用法，不是字面上的「游進去」，而是指記憶在他剛醒來時突然浮現、進入腦海。
generatedExample: A strange idea swum into her mind during the meeting.

explanationZhTw: 這裡的 `sodden` 不是「濕透的」字面義，而是形容人還沉浸在夢境的氛圍裡，有一種被夢「泡住」的感覺。
generatedExample: She stayed sodden in the sadness of the memory for hours.

explanationZhTw: `luminous` 指「發光的、明亮的」，這裡用來描寫夢境很清澈、柔亮，帶有超現實的光感。
generatedExample: The room felt luminous after the rain washed the windows clean.

explanationZhTw: 這裡的 `landscape` 不是單純「風景」，而是把他的一生想成一整片可展開的景象，帶有比喻意味。
generatedExample: Her childhood looked like a strange landscape when she thought about it later.

explanationZhTw: `interminable` 表示「似乎沒有盡頭的、無窮無盡的」，用來強調夢中的距離深遠到看不到終點。
generatedExample: We walked along the interminable road until midnight.

explanationZhTw: `comprehended` 在這裡是「被理解、被意識到」的意思，語氣比一般的 `understood` 更正式。
generatedExample: At last, the pattern was comprehended by everyone in the room.

explanationZhTw: `consisted in` 是比較正式的說法，意思是「其本質在於／就是由……構成」。
generatedExample: Her success consisted in patience and careful planning.

explanationZhTw: `shelter` 這裡是動詞，表示「保護、掩護」那個小男孩免受子彈傷害，不是名詞「避難所」。
generatedExample: He raised his coat to shelter the child from the wind.

explanationZhTw: `blew them both to pieces` 是強烈的慣用說法，意思是「把他們炸得粉碎／炸成碎片」，用來表達極端暴力的毀滅。
generatedExample: The explosion blew the old wall to pieces.

explanationZhTw: 「until this moment」表示「直到此刻、到現在為止」。用來強調某件事在說話當下才被改變或理解。
generatedExample: Until this moment, I had no idea you were here.

explanationZhTw: 「believed」是「相信、認為」的意思，表示過去某個時點的想法或判斷。這裡是指他一直以為自己已經殺了母親。
generatedExample: I believed the letter was lost, but it was in my bag.

explanationZhTw: 「murdered」是「謀殺、故意殺害」。這個字比一般的「kill」更強烈，通常指蓄意且非法地殺人。
generatedExample: The police said the victim was murdered at night.

explanationZhTw: 在這裡是「謀殺；故意殺害」的意思，指蓄意殺人，不是一般的「殺死」。
generatedExample: The police think he planned to murder his business partner.

explanationZhTw: 「murder」指「謀殺、故意殺害」，這裡是一般法律/犯罪語境中的用字，屬於中階常見詞。
generatedExample: The police said he did not murder anyone.

explanationZhTw: 這裡的「physically」不是在講「身體上健康與否」，而是指「以實際肢體行為／直接動手的方式」。整句是在補充說明：他不是「親手」殺的。
generatedExample: I was angry with him, but not physically.

explanationZhTw: 「glimpse」是指短暫的一瞥、匆匆看到一下，這裡表示他最後一次很短暫地看見母親的情景。
generatedExample: I caught a glimpse of her through the window.

explanationZhTw: 「cluster」在這裡不是果實或星群，而是指一組、一串彼此相關的小事件。
generatedExample: A cluster of small problems caused the delay.

explanationZhTw: 「come back」這裡是片語動詞，意思是回到腦中、重新浮現。
generatedExample: The memory came back as soon as I saw the photo.

explanationZhTw: 這裡是比喻用法，表示他多年來有意把這段記憶壓到意識之外，也就是刻意不去想。
generatedExample: He pushed the thought out of his consciousness and kept working.

explanationZhTw: 形容地方或情況又吵又亂、很不安定；這裡是在描寫戰時環境的混亂感。
generatedExample: The street was rackety all night because of the traffic and music.

explanationZhTw: 空襲，指飛機從空中對地面目標發動攻擊。
generatedExample: People rushed into shelters during the air-raids.

explanationZhTw: 在地鐵站避難；這裡的 Tube 是英式說法，指倫敦地鐵。
generatedExample: During the bombing, families spent the night sheltering in Tube stations.

explanationZhTw: 瓦礫；建築物倒塌後剩下的碎石、磚塊等。
generatedExample: After the explosion, the road was covered with rubble.

explanationZhTw: 無法理解的；看不懂或聽不懂的。
generatedExample: Her handwriting was almost unintelligible.

explanationZhTw: 排隊的人龍；英式英語常用。
generatedExample: There were long queues outside the museum.

explanationZhTw: 斷斷續續的；不是一直持續，而是時有時無。
generatedExample: We heard intermittent rain during the afternoon.

explanationZhTw: 到處找東西、四處搜刮；帶有勉強湊到資源的意味。
generatedExample: They spent the day scrounging round for spare parts.

explanationZhTw: 垃圾桶；英式英語常用，等於 trash can / garbage can。
generatedExample: He threw the empty box into the dustbins behind the shop.

explanationZhTw: 不新鮮的；通常形容麵包、空氣或食物失去原本的鮮度。
generatedExample: The bread was stale, so I toasted it.

explanationZhTw: 顛簸、猛地震動；這裡指車子經過坑洞路面時劇烈搖晃。
generatedExample: The bus jolted over the rough road.

explanationZhTw: 油餅、油粕；此處是動物飼料的一種，屬比較專門的字。
generatedExample: The farm bought oil-cake to feed the cattle.

explanationZhTw: 表示「突然發生在她身上／她整個人突然變了」，這裡不是字面上的「來到她身上」，而是指情緒或狀態驟變。
generatedExample: A strange calm came over her after she heard the news.

explanationZhTw: 指「沒有精神、毫無活力」，常用來形容人因打擊、疲憊或失落而顯得萎靡。
generatedExample: After weeks of bad sleep, he looked pale and spiritless.

explanationZhTw: 表示「很明顯、顯而易見」，是常見的重要字彙。
generatedExample: It was evident that they had already agreed on the plan.

explanationZhTw: 指「多餘的、不必要的」，這裡是說她動作沒有任何浪費的部分。
generatedExample: The report was clear, with no superfluous detail.

explanationZhTw: 在這裡指「供藝術家參考姿勢的假人／人偶」，不是一般人說的「人物」。
generatedExample: The painter arranged the lay-figure by the window before starting.

explanationZhTw: 這裡的意思是「自然地又回到靜止狀態」，不是醫學上常見的「復發」用法。
generatedExample: After the conversation, the room seemed to relapse naturally into stillness.

explanationZhTw: 指「像猴子的、猿類般的」，這裡是在形容孩子因瘦弱而顯得有猴子般的臉。
generatedExample: The caricature gave the actor a simian grin.

explanationZhTw: 舊式說法，指床罩或床單；這裡是床上白色的覆蓋物。
generatedExample: The old guest room still had a white counterpane on the bed.

explanationZhTw: 英式家居用語，指瓦斯爐上的火圈或爐頭部分。
generatedExample: She put the kettle on the gas ring in the fender.

explanationZhTw: 陶製洗手槽或水槽；earthenware 指燒製陶器材質。
generatedExample: The cottage had a brown earthenware sink in the kitchen.

explanationZhTw: 把……視為理所當然。
generatedExample: I took it for granted that the train would be on time.

explanationZhTw: 懇求、苦苦要求；比 ask 更正式，也更強烈。
generatedExample: He beseeched the manager not to cancel the trip.

explanationZhTw: 站崗、守著；這裡表示母親不在時沒人看守食物。
generatedExample: A security officer stood guard at the door all night.

explanationZhTw: 偷偷拿走、順手牽羊；通常指零星、小量的偷取。
generatedExample: Someone was pilfering coins from the charity box.

explanationZhTw: `ration` 在這裡指「配給量」或「定額供應的食物」，不是一般的「比例」。
generatedExample: Each family received a weekly ration of rice.

explanationZhTw: `issued` 在此是「發放、配給」的意思，屬於正式用法。
generatedExample: The school issued new ID cards to all students.

explanationZhTw: `morsel` 指「一小塊、一點點食物」，這裡強調巧克力很少。
generatedExample: She offered me a morsel of bread.

explanationZhTw: `slab` 在這裡是「厚塊、整塊」的意思，常用來形容巧克力或石板。
generatedExample: He broke the chocolate slab into smaller pieces.

explanationZhTw: `booming voice` 指「洪亮、低沉而很大的聲音」，不是普通的說話聲。
generatedExample: The announcer spoke in a booming voice that filled the room.

explanationZhTw: `greedy` 是「貪心的、貪婪的」，這裡指想把整塊巧克力都拿走。
generatedExample: Don't be greedy and take the last cookie.

explanationZhTw: `nagging` 在這裡表示「持續不斷、惱人的」，形容爭執一直拖著不結束。
generatedExample: I had a nagging worry that I had forgotten something.

explanationZhTw: `went round and round` 是慣用語，意思是「反覆糾纏、一直繞著同一件事打轉」。
generatedExample: We kept going round and round on the same question.

explanationZhTw: `remonstrances` 是較正式的詞，指「抗議、勸阻、表示不滿的話」。
generatedExample: His remonstrances did not change her mind.

explanationZhTw: `clinging` 指「緊緊抓住不放」，這裡描寫小妹妹緊抓著母親。
generatedExample: The child was clinging to her father in the crowded station.

explanationZhTw: `mournful` 指「哀傷的、憂愁的」，用來形容眼神很難過。
generatedExample: The dog gave me a mournful look.

explanationZhTw: `broke off` 這裡是片語動詞，意思是「折下、掰下一部分」。
generatedExample: She broke off a piece of bread and shared it with me.

explanationZhTw: `dully` 在這裡不是「遲鈍地」的單一字面，而是「木然地、毫無反應地」看著。
generatedExample: He stared dully at the screen after the long meeting.

explanationZhTw: `snatched` 指「一把搶走、迅速抓走」，帶有突然又粗暴的動作感。
generatedExample: She snatched the phone from the table and ran outside.

explanationZhTw: `fleeing` 是「逃跑、逃離」，這裡表示他拿走巧克力後立刻跑向門口。
generatedExample: The cat was fleeing from the dog.

explanationZhTw: 這裡的 `call after someone` 指「對著走遠的人喊、在後面叫住對方」，不是單純「打電話給」。
generatedExample: My dad called after me as I left the house.

explanationZhTw: `come back` 是常見片語動詞，意思是「回來、再回到原處」。
generatedExample: Come back here when you finish your lunch.

explanationZhTw: `give ... back` 表示「把某物還給某人、歸還」。這裡是母親要求他把巧克力還給妹妹。
generatedExample: Please give me back my pen.

explanationZhTw: 「anxious」這裡是形容詞，表示「焦急的、擔心的」。
generatedExample: She looked anxious when the train was late.

explanationZhTw: 「be fixed on」在這裡不是字面上的「固定」，而是表示「緊盯著、注視著」。
generatedExample: All eyes were fixed on the speaker.

explanationZhTw: 「on the point of」是慣用說法，表示「即將要、正要」。
generatedExample: We were on the point of leaving when the phone rang.

explanationZhTw: 「set up」這裡不是「設立」，而是指「突然開始（哭鬧、哀號等）」。
generatedExample: The baby set up a loud cry as soon as the door closed.

explanationZhTw: 「feeble」表示「微弱的、無力的」。
generatedExample: He gave a feeble smile and said nothing.

explanationZhTw: 「fled」是「flee」的過去式，表示「逃跑、逃走」。
generatedExample: The child fled into the house when it started to rain.

explanationZhTw: 這裡不是單純的「吃」，而是「狼吞虎嚥地吃光」。語氣比一般 eat 強很多，帶有急促、貪吃的感覺。
generatedExample: She devoured the sandwich in less than a minute.

explanationZhTw: phrasal verb，意思是「閒晃、逗留、到處混著不走」。
generatedExample: We hung about outside the station until the rain stopped.

explanationZhTw: idiom，意思是「直到今天、到現在還」。用來強調某件事延續到現在仍然成立。
generatedExample: To this day, nobody knows who wrote the note.

explanationZhTw: 這裡的意思是「確切地、肯定地」。不是在談 certainty 這個名詞本身，而是強調他沒有把握。
generatedExample: I can't say with any certainty when she will arrive.

explanationZhTw: 這裡表示「只不過、只是」，用來把情況縮小成較輕的一種可能。
generatedExample: He merely wanted to ask a question.

explanationZhTw: term，指「強制勞動營」，也就是被迫工作的拘禁場所。
generatedExample: The prisoners were taken to a forced-labour camp.

explanationZhTw: 這裡不是一般的「移除」，而是「被帶走、被轉送走」的被動說法，帶有官方處置的冷漠語氣。
generatedExample: Several children were removed from the town after the fire.

explanationZhTw: term，書中對「無家可歸兒童收容／改造中心」的名稱；這是特定制度用語，不是一般日常說法。
generatedExample: The old map marked the site of the Reclamation Centres.

explanationZhTw: idiom，意思是「某個不明確的地方、哪裡哪裡」。說話者不知道或不想指明確切地點。
generatedExample: I left my keys somewhere or other and can't find them now.

explanationZhTw: 生動鮮明；這裡指夢境在記憶裡依然很清楚，不是普通的「活潑」意思。
generatedExample: The memory of the accident was still vivid after many years.

explanationZhTw: 包裹、環繞；在這裡強調那個手臂姿勢像是在把人包住，帶有保護感。
generatedExample: She felt safe under the enveloping blanket of silence.

explanationZhTw: 被包含其中、濃縮在其中；這裡不是字面上的「放進容器裡」，而是說整個夢的意義似乎都集中在這個動作裡。
generatedExample: All of the tension seemed to be contained in that one look.

explanationZhTw: 回想起、回到；這裡指他的思緒回到另一個夢境。
generatedExample: My mind went back to the last time I saw her.

explanationZhTw: 昏暗骯髒的、灰暗破舊的；形容床看起來不乾淨、很不起眼。
generatedExample: They met in a dingy little cafe near the station.

explanationZhTw: 緊緊抓著、依附著；這裡指孩子貼著母親不放。
generatedExample: The baby was clinging to his mother’s coat.

explanationZhTw: 下沉的、沉沒的；這裡形容船身已經沉到水裡。
generatedExample: The divers explored the sunken ship off the coast.

explanationZhTw: 「disappearance」指「失蹤、消失不見」，這裡是指母親忽然不見了，通常帶有無法找到的意味。
generatedExample: The disappearance of the bicycle worried everyone in the neighborhood.

explanationZhTw: 「roll over」在這裡是「翻身、轉向另一邊」的意思，不是單純的「滾過去」。
generatedExample: I rolled over in bed and tried to go back to sleep.

explanationZhTw: 這裡的「settled herself」是情境用法，意思是「讓自己安頓到一個更舒服的姿勢」，強調動作完成後身體變得更放鬆。
generatedExample: She settled herself into the armchair and opened the book.

explanationZhTw: 這裡的 beastly 不是字面上的「野獸般的」，而是英式口語中的貶義加強語，意思接近「很糟的、討厭的、可惡的」。
generatedExample: That was a beastly thing to say in front of everyone.

explanationZhTw: indistinctly 表示「說得含糊不清、聽不分明地」。
generatedExample: She answered indistinctly because she was still half asleep.

explanationZhTw: swine 在這裡是罵人的詞，指「討厭的人、卑鄙的人」，不是字面上的「豬」。
generatedExample: He called his rival a swine after the argument.

explanationZhTw: 這裡的 `point` 不是「點」的字面意思，而是指「重點、核心意思、真正要表達的事」。整句是在說：故事真正重要的地方還沒說完。
generatedExample: I understood the plot, but the real point of the story was about trust.

explanationZhTw: go off to sleep 是片語動詞，意思是「入睡、睡著」。
generatedExample: The baby went off to sleep before the movie ended.

explanationZhTw: refugee 指「難民」；這裡用來描述因戰亂或迫害而逃離家園的人。
generatedExample: The refugee family arrived with only two bags.

explanationZhTw: of no account 是慣用語，意思是「不重要、無關緊要」。
generatedExample: That mistake is of no account compared with the bigger issue.

explanationZhTw: in the grip of 表示「受……控制；被……強烈支配」，常用來形容情緒、疾病或權力的控制感。
generatedExample: He was in the grip of panic during the storm.

explanationZhTw: 這是比喻說法，意思是「被徹底從歷史中抹去、像不存在一樣消失」。
generatedExample: The dictator tried to lift his enemies clean out of the stream of history.

explanationZhTw: loyalties 指「忠誠、效忠關係」；private loyalties 這裡是指私人的人際忠誠，而不是對政黨或國家的忠誠。
generatedExample: Her private loyalties made the decision difficult.

explanationZhTw: spring to life 是慣用片語，意思是「突然活躍起來；突然開始運作或出現」。
generatedExample: The old city springs to life after sunset.

explanationZhTw: hold on to 是片語動詞，意思是「緊緊抓住；保住；不放棄」。
generatedExample: She held on to the railing while climbing the stairs.

explanationZhTw: 《一九八四》中的「proles」指「無產者／下層平民」，是小說裡的特定社會階層稱呼，帶有貶抑與階級區分的意味。
generatedExample: The proles worked long hours but still tried to enjoy small moments of freedom.

explanationZhTw: 「human beings」就是「人類／人」，比單說 `people` 更正式，這裡強調他們和其他人一樣有人性。
generatedExample: All human beings deserve basic dignity and respect.

explanationZhTw: `aloud` 表示「出聲地、唸出來」，不是在心裡想，而是讓別人也聽得到。
generatedExample: She read the note aloud so everyone in the room could hear it.

explanationZhTw: 這裡的 `human` 不只是字面上的「人類」，而是在政治和道德語境中指「有尊嚴、被當成人看待的人」。
generatedExample: After the treatment they received, they said they no longer felt human.

explanationZhTw: 「Why not?」在這裡不是在真的提問，而是表示「好啊、可以啊、為什麼不呢」，帶有同意或接受提議的語氣。
generatedExample: "Want to take a break?" "Why not?"

explanationZhTw: `wake up` 是常見的片語動詞，意思是「醒來、睡醒」。這裡用完成式 `had woken up`，表示朱莉亞已經再次醒來。
generatedExample: I woke up early and couldn't go back to sleep.

explanationZhTw: 「occur to someone」表示某人突然想到、意識到某件事；這裡是「你有沒有想過／有沒有想到」的意思。
generatedExample: It occurred to me that we should leave early.

explanationZhTw: 「walk out of here」是片語動詞，意思是「從這裡離開、走出去」；在這裡帶有突然離開的語氣。
generatedExample: If the meeting gets worse, I might just walk out of here.

explanationZhTw: 「too late」是慣用說法，表示「已經來不及、為時已晚」。
generatedExample: We should call them now, before it's too late.

explanationZhTw: 這裡不是指「發生在我身上」，而是指「我想到、我突然有這個念頭」。在句中表示說話者其實已經想過這件事。
generatedExample: It occurred to me that we might be late.

explanationZhTw: 這是慣用說法，意思是「儘管如此、還是照樣」。用來表示前面承認某件事，但結果不因此改變。
generatedExample: I know it looks risky, but I'll try it all the same.

explanationZhTw: `innocent` 在這裡不是單純指「天真無邪」，而是帶有「不會引人懷疑、看起來無害」的語氣。
generatedExample: Her face looked innocent, so the guard did not question her.

explanationZhTw: `keep clear of` 是片語動詞，意思是「避開、遠離」。這裡是在勸對方不要和像我這樣的人接觸，以免惹上危險。
generatedExample: You should keep clear of that alley after dark.

explanationZhTw: `stay alive` 是常見說法，意思是「活下去、保住性命」。
generatedExample: The doctor worked hard to help the patient stay alive.

explanationZhTw: phrasal verb，意思是「把事情想清楚、完整規劃好」；這裡表示說話者已經先把整個行動計畫盤算完成。
generatedExample: She thought the plan all out before the meeting.

explanationZhTw: 形容詞，意思是「沮喪的、灰心的」。這裡是在勸對方不要太失落。
generatedExample: He felt downhearted after hearing the bad news.

explanationZhTw: 在這裡指「活下去、保住性命」，語意很直接，但放在這段話裡帶有一種冷靜、甚至帶點諷刺的自我評估。
generatedExample: In a storm, the only goal was staying alive.

explanationZhTw: 這是固定說法，表示「無法知道／很難預測」。
generatedExample: There's no knowing what he will decide tomorrow.

explanationZhTw: 「utterly」是加強語氣的副詞，整體意思是「完全孤單、徹底孤立」。
generatedExample: After moving abroad, I felt utterly alone for a while.

explanationZhTw: 這裡指「抓到、控制住、逮住」，不是單純的「拿到」。
generatedExample: If they get hold of the evidence, the case will change.

explanationZhTw: 指「坦白、供認」；在這裡特別是「承認罪行或錯誤」。
generatedExample: He finally confessed after the police showed him the video.

explanationZhTw: 指「坦白、供認」；在這裡特別是「承認罪行或錯誤」。
generatedExample: He finally confessed after the police showed him the video.

explanationZhTw: 這裡是「延後、拖延」的意思，不是「讓人失去興趣」。
generatedExample: We had to put off the meeting until next week.

explanationZhTw: 這裡是「出賣彼此、背叛對方」；語氣比一般的「背叛」更偏向在壓力下不供出對方。
generatedExample: They promised not to betray one another under pressure.

explanationZhTw: 固定表達，表示「完全沒有任何影響／一點差別都沒有」。
generatedExample: It won't make the slightest difference if we start five minutes late.

explanationZhTw: confess 的現在分詞，意思是「承認、坦白（罪行或錯誤）」。
generatedExample: He kept confessing to things he had not done.

explanationZhTw: 慣用說法，這裡表示「確實、的確、沒錯」，語氣有點口語/地方色彩。
generatedExample: He was right enough about the weather turning bad.

explanationZhTw: 慣用語，表示「無法控制、無可奈何、也沒辦法」。
generatedExample: She felt nervous, but she couldn't help it.

explanationZhTw: 動詞，意思是「拷問、折磨」。在這裡是字面上的強烈虐待。
generatedExample: The soldiers torture prisoners for information.

explanationZhTw: 「confessing」指坦白、承認或供認；這裡是在說他不只是「承認」那件事。
generatedExample: She kept confessing that she had made a mistake.

explanationZhTw: 「confession」是坦白、供認；此處指把心裡的事說出來。
generatedExample: His confession came after a long silence.

explanationZhTw: 「betrayal」是背叛、出賣；這裡強調坦白不等於背叛。
generatedExample: She felt a deep betrayal when her secret was shared.

explanationZhTw: 「feelings」是感受、情感；在這裡特別指對某人的愛意或內心情感。
generatedExample: He tried to hide his feelings, but everyone noticed.

explanationZhTw: 這裡的意思不是單純「停止一個動作」，而是被迫失去對你的愛；也就是感情被切斷。
generatedExample: Nothing can make me stop loving my family.

explanationZhTw: phrasal verb，意思是「仔細想一想；反覆斟酌後再決定」。
generatedExample: She thought it over before replying to the email.

explanationZhTw: 此處不是字面上的「進到你裡面」，而是指「滲透你的內心、控制你的想法或信念」。
generatedExample: Their threats might scare you, but they can't get inside you.

explanationZhTw: 這裡不是字面上的「進到你裡面」，而是指「影響你的內心、思想或意志」。
generatedExample: Their criticism can hurt, but it shouldn't get inside you.

explanationZhTw: 這裡的意思不是單純「保持人類」，而是「在壓迫下仍保有人性、良知與同情心」。
generatedExample: In a stressful job, staying human matters as much as staying productive.

explanationZhTw: 表示「值得做、值得付出」，強調即使沒有外在成果，這件事本身仍有價值。
generatedExample: Learning to apologize is worth while, even when it feels uncomfortable.

explanationZhTw: 這裡的 `result` 指「成效、效果、成果」；`whatever` 用來加強否定語氣，表示「完全沒有任何結果」。
generatedExample: The warning had no result whatever, so they kept making the same mistake.

explanationZhTw: 這裡不是單純「打敗」的動作，而是指在精神或價值上戰勝了對方。
generatedExample: By refusing to lie, she knew she had beaten them in the only way that mattered.

explanationZhTw: 指《一九八四》裡的監視裝置，不只是螢幕，還兼具監看與監聽的功能。
generatedExample: The telescreen in the apartment never made anyone feel alone.

explanationZhTw: 指暗中監視、偷窺你的行動或資訊，語氣比一般的 watch 更帶有秘密監控的意味。
generatedExample: The company seemed to spy upon its employees through every device.

explanationZhTw: 慣用語，意思是保持冷靜、不要慌亂。
generatedExample: In an emergency, you need to keep your head and think clearly.

explanationZhTw: 這裡不是字面「在他們手中」，而是指落入對方控制、被對方掌握。
generatedExample: Once the evidence was in their hands, we had little choice.

explanationZhTw: 這裡指用疲勞、孤立和反覆盤問慢慢消磨人的意志，不是單純指物理上的磨損。
generatedExample: The long delay caused a wearing-down of everyone's patience.

explanationZhTw: 指被逼著吐出資訊、供出真相，帶有強迫拷問的意味。
generatedExample: After hours of questioning, the officer finally squeezed the truth out of him.

explanationZhTw: 這裡的 human 不是單指「人類」，而是指保有人性、道德感與同情心。
generatedExample: She said the goal was not just to win, but to stay human while doing it.

explanationZhTw: 慣用語，意思是完全揭露、攤開來讓人看見。
generatedExample: The report laid bare the flaws in the system.

explanationZhTw: 這裡不是字面上的「堅固城堡」，而是指內在深處仍然無法被攻破、無法完全看透。
generatedExample: His confidence looked impregnable, even under pressure.
